category_sources: Official GitHub README says Davix manages files over HTTP-based protocols and supports WebDAV.
source_facts.description says library and tools for advanced file I/O with HTTP-based protocols.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Davix at https://github.com/cern-fts/davix.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage and compiling documentation.
Official GitHub README says to visit https://davix.web.cern.ch for latest documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository value https://github.com/cern-fts/davix; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes HTTP file management, WebDAV support, S3-compatible services, and command-line tools.
source_facts.executables lists davix-get, davix-ls, davix-put, and related tools.
